prompt: A futuristic luxury skincare product advertisement in a cool icy blue palette, shot as a high-end studio beauty campaign. Center a frosted white pump bottle labeled SECURE-IP with minimalist navy text reading IP ADDRESS CLEANSER, plus smaller lines "for risk-free connections", "pour des connexions sans risque", and "75 ml / 2.5 fl. oz. - Data Stream Purifier" near the bottom. Place the bottle upright on a glossy wet reflective surface covered with realistic water droplets, with the translucent round cap lying off to the right behind the bottle. Surround the product with floating sharp-edged transparent glass shards and crystal fragments, suspended in midair like shattered ice. Several larger shards act as labeled callout panels: exactly 6 text shards reading "TEXTURE" on the left over a close-up of dewy skin, "SHIELD" in the upper right, "HYDRATION" on the right over a close-up of a blue eye and wet skin, "SECURITY SHIELD" in the lower left over a subtle hexagonal honeycomb pattern, "PROTECT" at bottom left, and "CLEANSE" at lower right. Integrate beauty-image fragments inside some of the shards: one shard shows cheek and lips with luminous skin texture, one shows a female eye with long lashes and water droplets on the skin, and one shows a scientific honeycomb barrier pattern. Add a tall soft rectangular frosted panel hovering behind the pump head in the upper center to create layered depth. Include two iridescent glass spheres on the wet surface, one at the lower left corner and one at the lower right corner. Use bright sparkling highlights, prismatic rainbow refractions, glowing rim light, floating mist, micro-particles, and a crisp 4K cosmetic advertising finish. The composition should feel premium, clean, protective, and cyber-skincare themed, blending hydration science with digital security metaphors.
